title: psilochenia modocensis subsp. rostrata
intro: Psilochenia modocensis subsp. rostrata, also known as Modoc false gentian, is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Psilochenia modocensis subsp. rostrata are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
